In this specific sense, "watching the growth" of these self-similar structures corresponds to observing the gradual formation of time-crystal-like ordering.
summary:
封闭的量子系统可以在没有外部驱动的情况下产生持久的类似时间晶体的动力学吗？在贝特曼双振荡器框架内，我们表明答案是肯定的。我们考虑一个非相对论 (2+1) 维系统，其中自旋引起的空间变形产生有效的贝特曼振荡器结构。量化后，系统由时间无关的厄米哈密顿量控制，描述阻尼和放大振荡器扇区之间的相干耦合，同时保留全局加倍系统的总能量。追踪放大的扇区，我们得出可观察子系统的有效非马尔可夫简化动力学。由此产生的记忆效应维持子系统可观察量的持续振荡，并生成紧急的类似时间晶体的时间顺序，而无需外部周期性驱动或平衡自发对称性破缺。由于振荡行为源自非平衡简化的子系统动力学，而不是完整哈密顿量的平衡期望值，因此该机制超出了平衡时间晶体的传统不可行定理的假设。

同样的动力学进一步表现出对数螺旋轨迹和自相似分形尺度，揭示了相干耗散动力学、非马尔可夫记忆效应和全局酉量子系统中的紧急时间排序之间的直接联系。在这个特定的意义上，“观察这些自相似结构的生长”对应于观察时间晶体状有序的逐渐形成。

title: Perturbative approach to the first law of quantum thermodynamics
abstract: In quantum thermodynamics, the decomposition of energy exchanges into heat and work remains an open problem beyond weak-coupling and slow-driving regimes. Recent formulations have shown that quantum coherence introduces additional energy contributions whose thermodynamic interpretation is still under debate, raising fundamental questions about the structure of the quantum first law. In this work, we investigate this problem through a time-dependent perturbative framework applied to the first law of quantum thermodynamics. By expanding the thermodynamic quantities up to second order, we derive explicit perturbative corrections for work, heat, and coherence contributions. Our results show that the coherence term can be consistently decomposed into coherent heat and coherent work, demonstrating that quantum coherence does not require the introduction of an independent energetic contribution beyond heat and work. The formalism resolves inconsistencies associated with previous formulations of the quantum first law, including the interpretation of coherence contributions and their connection with entropy fluxes. At second order, the perturbative corrections become directly connected to transition rates governed by Fermi's golden rule, establishing a bridge between microscopic quantum transitions and macroscopic thermodynamic quantities. These results provide a physically transparent framework to investigate coherence-driven thermodynamic processes and offer new perspectives for the analysis of driven quantum systems and nonequilibrium quantum technologies.
summary:
在量子热力学中，能量交换分解为热和功仍然是弱耦合和慢驱动机制之外的一个悬而未决的问题。最近的公式表明，量子相干性引入了额外的能量贡献，其热力学解释仍在争论中，引发了有关量子第一定律结构的基本问题。在这项工作中，我们通过应用于量子热力学第一定律的时间相关微扰框架来研究这个问题。通过将热力学量扩展到二阶，我们得出了对功、热量和相干性贡献的显式微扰修正。我们的结果表明，相干项可以一致地分解为相干热和相干功，这表明量子相干性不需要引入除热和功之外的独立能量贡献。该形式主义解决了与量子第一定律先前表述相关的不一致问题，包括相干性贡献的解释及其与熵通量的联系。

在二阶上，微扰修正与费米黄金法则控制的跃迁速率直接相关，在微观量子跃迁和宏观热力学量之间建立了一座桥梁。这些结果为研究相干驱动的热力学过程提供了一个物理透明的框架，并为分析驱动量子系统和非平衡量子技术提供了新的视角。

title: Developing a photon-number-resolving detection chain for quantum communication protocols involving mesoscopic states of light
abstract: We present the characterization of a photon-number-resolving detection chain based on Silicon photomultipliers (SiPM) coupled to a 14 bit, 1 Gs\s digital acquisition system embedding an FPGA-based signal processing pipeline that performs real-time baseline subtraction, digital deconvolution, and charge integration. Three SiPM models manufactured by Hamamatsu are tested and compared in the mesoscopic intensity regime using both classical coherent states and quantum twin-beam states, enabling a systematic investigation of the effects of pixel pitch, pile-up, and photon detection efficiency on the detector performance.
summary: 我们展示了基于硅光电倍增管 (SiPM) 的光子数分辨检测链的特性，该检测链与 14 位、1 Gs\s 数字采集系统相耦合，该系统嵌入了基于 FPGA 的信号处理管道，可执行实时基线减法、数字反卷积和电荷积分。滨松制造的三个 SiPM 模型使用经典相干态和量子双光束态在介观强度范围内进行了测试和比较，从而能够系统地研究像素间距、堆积和光子检测效率对探测器性能的影响。

title: Induced transitions in non-Hermitian spin-boson models with time-dependent boundaries
abstract: We study a time-dependent non-Hermitian extension of the Schütte-Da~Providência spin-boson Hamiltonian with complex couplings. A time-dependent Dyson map containing a squeezing transformation maps the model, in an admissible bounded regime, to a Hermitian Hamiltonian with real instantaneous energy spectrum. The squeezing contribution generates a dilatation term allowing the Hermitian partner to be interpreted as a fixed-domain representation of a system with moving boundaries. While the fixed-boundary Hermitian model conserves $Q=N-S_0$ and forbids transitions between sectors differing by two bosonic quanta, the boundary motion opens such channels. For closed boundary protocols with constant background parameters the first-order integrated transition amplitude vanishes, reflecting the unitary nature of constant squeezing. Nontrivial transition control arises when the non-Hermitian parameter varies during the boundary motion, changing the dressed basis and allowing boundary-induced transitions to be suppressed or enhanced by coherent interference.
summary: 我们研究了具有复杂耦合的 Schütte-Da~Providência 自旋玻色子哈密顿量的时间相关非厄米扩张。包含挤压变换的瞬态戴森图将模型在可接受的有界范围内映射到具有真实瞬时能谱的厄米哈密顿量。挤压贡献产生一个膨胀项，允许埃尔米特伙伴被解释为具有移动边界的系统的固定域表示。虽然固定边界埃尔米特模型守恒 $Q=N-S_0$ 并禁止相差两个玻色子量子的扇区之间的过渡，但边界运动打开了此类通道。对于具有恒定背景参数的闭合边界协议，一阶积分跃迁幅度消失，反映了恒定挤压的统一性质。当非厄米参数在边界运动期间发生变化时，就会出现非平凡的过渡控制，从而改变修饰基础并允许通过相干干涉来抑制或增强边界引起的过渡。

title: Quantum algorithm for Discrete Gaussian Sampling
abstract: Discrete Gaussian Sampling on lattices is a fundamental problem in lattice-based cryptography. It appears both in basic cryptographic primitives such as digital signatures and as an important cryptanalysis building block for solving hard lattice problems. In this paper, we show a quantum algorithm based on the quantum rejection sampling technique whose complexity is asymptotically quadratically faster than its classical counterpart in [Wang & Ling, IEEE Trans. Inf. Theory 2019]. Our sampler outputs a quantum state which can either be measured to get the desired distribution or be used directly as such in other quantum algorithms. By doing so, we derive two versions of quantum dual attacks that improve upon the previous ones in [Pouly & Shen, EUROCRYPT 2024]. The two versions are incomparable, each having distinct advantages (speed vs memory requirement). The second version is particularly interesting as it requires only polynomial classical and quantum memory, excluding the classical memory used in the preprocessing step of the Discrete Gaussian sampler. Our quantum Discrete Gaussian sampler can also be used to speed up the algorithm for solving the Short Integer Solution problem, in any norm, of [Bollauf, Pouly & Shen, ePrint 2026/225].
summary:
格上的离散高斯采样是基于格的密码学中的一个基本问题。它既出现在数字签名等基本密码原语中，又作为解决硬格问题的重要密码分析构建块出现。在本文中，我们展示了一种基于量子拒绝采样技术的量子算法，其复杂度比 [Wang & Ling，IEEE Trans.信息。理论2019]。我们的采样器输出一个量子态，可以对其进行测量以获得所需的分布，也可以直接在其他量子算法中使用。通过这样做，我们得出了两个版本的量子双重攻击，它们对 [Pouly & Shen, EUROCRYPT 2024] 中的先前版本进行了改进。这两个版本没有可比性，每个版本都有独特的优势（速度与内存要求）。第二个版本特别有趣，因为它只需要多项式经典和量子存储器，不包括离散高斯采样器的预处理步骤中使用的经典存储器。

我们的量子离散高斯采样器还可用于加速解决 [Bollauf, Pouly & Shen, ePrint 2026/225] 任何范数下的短整数解问题的算法。

title: Stochastic trajectories and excursions in a double quantum dot system
abstract: We investigate the trajectory-level dynamics of a double quantum dot system using the newly developed formalism of stochastic excursions. This approach extends full counting statistics by enabling a filtering of complex trajectories into sub-trajectories, which provide access to the intricate correlations between thermodynamic currents and excursion times. Counting observables are the main object of study in the stochastic excursion framework. Those are defined as a linear combination of transition counts multiplied by their assigned weights within one excursion. For three main counting observables -- charge current, dynamical activity, and entropy production -- we compute averages and noise contributions and show how they provide insights into the operation of the double quantum dot system. At the trajectory level, we analyze outcome distributions for transport and connect the results with trade-offs between successful and unsuccessful events that shape overall performance. We further introduce state observables, which depend on the state visited rather than the transition itself, and discuss the population of the two dots, as well as their correlations. Finally, we discuss thermodynamics of precision through thermo-kinetic uncertainty relations, showing how current precision in different regimes is fundamentally constrained either by entropy production or by dynamical activity. Altogether, our work is a case study that highlights the utility of the excursion framework as a toolkit to analyze many quantities of interest and to uncover the structure of nonequilibrium fluctuations. Moreover, it also suggests new avenues for refining uncertainty relations and understanding transport in mesoscopic systems.
summary:
我们使用新开发的随机偏移形式研究双量子点系统的轨迹级动力学。这种方法通过将复杂轨迹过滤为子轨迹来扩展完整的计数统计，从而提供热力学电流和偏移时间之间复杂的相关性。计数可观测量是随机偏移框架中的主要研究对象。它们被定义为一次偏移内的转换计数乘以它们分配的权重的线性组合。对于三个主要的计数可观察量——电荷电流、动态活动和熵产生——我们计算平均值和噪声贡献，并展示它们如何提供对双量子点系统操作的见解。在轨迹层面，我们分析运输的结果分布，并将结果与​​影响整体绩效的成功和不成功事件之间的权衡联系起来。我们进一步介绍状态可观察量，它取决于所访问的状态而不是转变本身，并讨论两个点的总体以及它们的相关性。

最后，我们通过热动力学不确定性关系讨论精度的热力学，表明不同状态下的当前精度如何从根本上受到熵产生或动态活动的限制。总而言之，我们的工作是一个案例研究，强调了偏移框架作为工具包的实用性，可以分析许多感兴趣的数量并揭示非平衡波动的结构。此外，它还提出了细化不确定性关系和理解介观系统中输运的新途径。
